description_long: This is a compact, black submachine gun with a distinctive folding wire stock and a detachable box magazine. The main body is constructed from metal, featuring a matte finish with some visible wear and utilitarian design. The grip is ergonomic and appears to be made of a different material, possibly polymer or plastic, with a greenish tint. The folding stock is made of metal wire, designed for portability and quick deployment. The barrel is short and robust, with a simple cylindrical muzzle and no visible attachments. Iron sights are present on the top, providing basic aiming capability.
description: A compact black submachine gun with a folding wire stock, detachable box magazine, and iron sights. The grip is greenish and ergonomic, and the overall design is utilitarian and robust.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the gun, the folding wire stock extended, and the greenish grip clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled top-down view highlighting the wire stock, the top of the receiver, and the magazine inserted at an angle.
description_view_2: Rear-side view focusing on the folded wire stock and the back of the receiver, with the grip and magazine partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wire stock, the magazine, and the barrel, with the grip and iron sights also visible.
